title: Implement a camera sensor calibration and imaging pipeline
instruction: Complete the imaging pipeline in imaging_pipeline.py. Implement: (1) dark_frame_subtraction to remove sensor readout noise, (2) flat_field_correction to normalize pixel sensitivity, (3) detect_hot_pixels to find pixels exceeding a sigma threshold from their local neighborhood, (4) apply_gaussian_blur for noise reduction with proper boundary handling. Handle edge cases: division by zero in flat field, NaN propagation, empty images, single-pixel images.
difficulty_rationale: Several coupled numerical imaging operations with edge cases, NaN behavior, and hidden tests.
